title: AssetCompositeModel
description: Contains information about a composite model in an asset. This object contains the asset's properties that you define in the composite model.

allOf.description: The name of the composite model.
The description of the composite model.
The type of the composite model. For alarm composite models, this type is AWS/ALARM.

properties.description: The asset properties that this composite model defines.

allOf.description: The ID of the asset composite model.
